---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
Date: Mon, Jul 21, 2025 at 3:16 PM
Subject: Re: Annual Certification Income Verification
To: Stalcup, Ariana <AStalcup@clackamas.us>


Here are the transactions and the original form 1040, which I will send to
the IRS tomorrow.

.... BECAUSE I HAVE HAD NO MAILBOX FOR MONTHS ....


On Mon, Jul 21, 2025 at 1:35 PM benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
wrote:

>
>
> On Mon, Jul 21, 2025 at 1:09 PM benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
> wrote:
>
>> if you want I will "late file" the same exact financial data in the IRS
>> 1040, that I already had late filed in the 1040-X, if for some reason it
>> makes you feel better to have the exact words 1040 on the top of the page.
>>
>> On Mon, Jul 21, 2025 at 12:52 PM benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
>> wrote:
>>
>>> I should also clarify something as well, the business hasn't made any
>>> money, all of the money comes from my friend in germany, to pay for one
>>> dude in california Kyle Rose minimum wage, and the AI / cloud compute
>>> expenses to build free and open source software tools that we can later
>>> open source and offer for free, which I did mention to you in the original
>>> letter, which contained a ledger of my transactions, to which I was
>>> demanded to provide to you in the form of a IRS 1040. So tell me what you
>>> want if not the ledger of my transactions, and not the 1040 tax return for
>>> FY2024
>>>
>>>
>>> https://docs.google.com/document/d/17uLnDCMZbfBAoAFWsl0W394_a66kJkq00oUvpaB7i5o/edit?tab=t.0
>>> https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Free_and_open-source_software
>>>
>>> https://github.com/endomorphosis/ipfs_kit_py?tab=AGPL-3.0-1-ov-file#readme
>>>
>>>
>>> [image: image.png]
>>>
>>> [image: image.png]
>>>
>>>
>>> On Mon, Jul 21, 2025 at 12:20 PM benjamin barber <starworks5@gmail.com>
>>> wrote:
>>>
>>>> I have to write to your employees in such a condescending manner,
>>>> because apparently not even you can bother to even read the contents of the
>>>> writing that you yourself sent to me just now, and I think that you too
>>>> also need to ask chatgpt, because you are incapable of comprehending how
>>>> taxes work, considering there is no schedule C for me to file because there
>>>> was no business income that occured in 2024 to file taxes on, and there
>>>> were no bank accounts until 2025. I have already sent you my 1040x, because
>>>> I missed filing any return at all before the filing deadline 2025, because
>>>> the 2024 income was below the "standard deduction", and there was no
>>>> monetary purpose in me filing taxes, the only purpose was for you to have
>>>> an "Notarized statement or affidavit signed by the applicant", which has
>>>> now been met.
>>>>
>>>> On Mon, Jul 21, 2025 at 12:09 PM Stalcup, Ariana <AStalcup@clackamas.us>
>>>> wrote:
>>>>
>>>>> Good afternoon Benjamin,
>>>>>
>>>>>
>>>>>
>>>>> I am Elena Sizmin’s supervisor. There is an issue with this year’s
>>>>> certification and your verification of income. I see that you provided a
>>>>> 1040-X as your income verification.
>>>>>
>>>>>
>>>>>
>>>>> Unfortunately, according to HUD the 1040-X is not acceptable document
>>>>> without the original 1040 and Schedule C documents provided with it or a
>>>>> 1040/1040A with notarized statements. I’ve also provided the HUD link below
>>>>> for you to read should you have questions.
>>>>>
>>>>>
>>>>>
>>>>>
>>>>>
>>>>> https://www.hud.gov/sites/documents/doc_35766.doc
>>>>>
>>>>>
>>>>>
>>>>> Also, when reading through emails between Elena and you, I observed
>>>>> that your tone and remarks were inappropriate and rude towards Elena. The
>>>>> Housing Authority of Clackamas County (HACC) strives to maintain
>>>>> professional and respectful interactions between all residents and
>>>>> employees. Moving forward, you are expected to:
>>>>>
>>>>>
>>>>>
>>>>>    - Maintaining
subject: Fwd: Annual Certification Income Verification
